name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && python3 -m pip install --user --upgrade pip && python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'
postAttachCommand: bash -lc 'uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload & streamlit run app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false'
